s2.ptxt: Using a brush or sponge, coat the application area of the No. 2 stoppers with Primer G.

item.ptxt: Do not apply too much primer.
Allow the primer coating to dry for 3 minutes or more.
Do not keep any of the opened Primer G for later use.

atten4.ptxt: If an area other than that specified is coated by accident, wipe off the primer with a clean piece of cloth before it dries.

s2.ptxt: Install 2 new No. 2 stoppers onto the windshield glass, as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Only 2-piece type No. 1 stoppers are supplied. Use the 2-piece type stoppers even if a 1-piece type was used.

s2.ptxt: Using a brush or sponge, coat the application area of the retainers with Primer G.

item.ptxt: Do not apply too much primer.
Allow the primer coating to dry for 3 minutes or more.
Do not keep any of the opened Primer G for later use.

atten4.ptxt: If an area other than that specified is coated by accident, wipe off the primer with a clean piece of cloth before it dries.

s2.ptxt: Install 2 new retainers onto the windshield glass, as shown in the illustration.
Install 2 new No. 1 stoppers to the vehicle body, as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Only 2-piece type No. 1 stoppers are supplied. Use the 2-piece type stoppers even if a 1-piece type was used.

s2.ptxt: Using a brush or sponge, coat the application area of moulding with Primer G.

item.ptxt: Do not apply too much primer.
Allow the primer coating to dry for 3 minutes or more.
Do not keep any of the opened Primer G for later use.

atten4.ptxt: If an area other than that specified is coated by accident, wipe off the primer with a clean piece of cloth before it dries.

s2.ptxt: Install a new moulding, as shown in the illustration.
Using a brush or sponge, coat the application area of adhesive dam with Primer G.

item.ptxt: Do not apply too much primer.
Allow the primer coating to dry for 3 minutes or more.
Do not keep any of the opened Primer G for later use.

atten4.ptxt: If an area other than that specified is coated by accident, wipe off the primer with a clean piece of cloth before it dries.

s2.ptxt: Install a new adhesive dam onto the windshield glass, as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: Install the new adhesive dam along the ceramic notches.

s2.ptxt: Position the windshield glass assembly.

s3.ptxt: Using a suction cup, place the windshield glass assembly in the correct position.
Check that the whole contact surface of the windshield glass rim is perfectly even.
Align the matchmarks on the windshield glass and vehicle body.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the windshield glass stoppers are attached to the vehicle body correctly.

s2.ptxt: Using a brush, coat the installation surface on the vehicle body with Primer M.

item.ptxt: Do not coat the adhesive with Primer M.
Do not apply too much primer.
Allow the primer coating to dry for 3 minutes or more.
Do not keep any of the opened Primer M for later use.

atten4.ptxt: If an area other than that specified is coated by accident, wipe off the primer with a clean piece of cloth before it dries.

s2.ptxt: Using a brush or sponge, coat the application area of adhesive with Primer G.

item.ptxt: Do not apply too much primer.
Allow the primer coating to dry for 3 minutes or more.
Do not keep any of the opened Primer G for later use.
Apply Primer G onto the ceramic notches.
If an area other than that specified is coated by accident, wipe off the primer with a clean piece of cloth before it dries.

s2.ptxt: Apply adhesive (Adhesive: TOYOTA genuine windshield glass adhesive or equivalent).

s3.ptxt: Cut off the tip of the cartridge nozzle, as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: After cutting off the tip, use all adhesive within the time described in the table below.

s3.ptxt: Load the sealer gun with cartridge.
Apply adhesive to the windshield glass, as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Apply adhesive onto the ceramic notches.

s2.ptxt: Install the windshield glass assembly.

s3.ptxt: Using a suction cup, position the windshield glass so that the matchmarks are aligned, and press it in gently along the rim.

item.ptxt: Check that the windshield glass stoppers are attached to the vehicle body correctly.
Check the clearance between the vehicle body and windshield glass.

s3.ptxt: Lightly press the front surface of the windshield glass to ensure a close fit.

atten4.ptxt: Press the glass with force of 98 N (10 kgf, 22 lb) or more.

s3.ptxt: If necessary, use a scraper to correct the level or position of adhesive that has been applied.

atten4.ptxt: Apply adhesive onto the windshield glass rim.

s3.ptxt: Hold the windshield glass using protective tape until the applied adhesive becomes hard.

atten3.ptxt: Do not drive the vehicle for the time described in the table below.

entry.ptxt: Minimum time prior to driving vehicle

s2.ptxt: After the adhesive has hardened, apply water from the outside of the vehicle. Check that no water leaks into the cabin.
If water leaks into the cabin, allow the water to dry and add adhesive.
Remove the protective tape.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ROOF HEADLINING ASSEMBLY (w/o Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Pull the roof headlining assembly into the vehicle through the rear left door.
Engage the 4 clips.
Connect the antenna cord sub-assembly connector and engage the clamp to the rear pillar RH.
Connect the antenna cord sub-assembly connector and engage each clamp to the front pillar RH.
Install the radio setting condenser to the front pillar RH with the bolt.
Connect the No. 1 roof wire connector and engage each clamp to the front pillar LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ROOF HEADLINING ASSEMBLY (w/ Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Pull the roof headlining assembly into the vehicle through the rear left door.
Engage the hook, 4 clips, and 2 fasteners.
Connect the sliding roof drive gear connector.
Connect the antenna cord sub-assembly connector and engage the clamp to the rear pillar RH.
Connect the antenna cord sub-assembly connector and engage each clamp to the front pillar RH.
Install the radio setting condenser to the front pillar RH with the bolt.
Connect the No. 1 roof wire connector and engage each clamp to the front pillar LH.
Assemble the front assist grip sub-assembly as shown in the illustration.
Install the front assist grip sub-assembly.

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws.
Push in the visor holder as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips and install the visor assembly LH.
Engage the 4 claws and install the visor bracket cover.

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s2.ptxt: Connect the connectors.
Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips, and then install the roof console box assembly.
Remove the protective cover.
Install a new clip <A> on the front pillar garnish LH.
Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips, then install the front pillar garnish LH.
Remove the protective cover.
Install a new clip <A> on the front pillar garnish RH.
Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips, then install the front pillar garnish RH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP LH

s2.ptxt: Install the front door opening trim weatherstrip LH as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: After installation, check that the corners fit correctly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP RH

s2.ptxt: Install the front door opening trim weatherstrip RH as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: After installation, check that the corners fit correctly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INNER REAR VIEW MIRROR ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made without EC Mirror)

s2.ptxt: Slide the inner rear view mirror assembly in the direction indicated by the arrow shown in the illustration to install it.
Engage the 2 claws and install the cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INNER REAR VIEW MIRROR ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made without EC Mirror)

s2.ptxt: Slide the inner rear view mirror assembly in the direction indicated by the arrow shown in the illustration to install it.
Using a "torx" socket wrench (T20), install the screw.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INNER REAR VIEW MIRROR ASSEMBLY (w/ EC Mirror)

s2.ptxt: Using a "torx" socket wrench (T20), install the inner rear view mirror with the screw.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INNER REAR VIEW MIRROR STAY HOLDER COVER (w/ EC Mirror)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 6 claws and install the inner rear view mirror stay holder cover.
Engage the 2 claws and install the inner rear view mirror stay holder cover as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COWL TOP VENTILATOR LOUVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws and install the cowl top ventilator louver sub-assembly.
Install the 2 clips.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT FENDER TO COWL SIDE SEAL RH

s2.ptxt: Engage the claw and install the front fender to cowl side seal RH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT FENDER TO COWL SIDE SEAL LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the claw and install the front fender to cowl side seal LH.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT CABLE TO NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL
INSTALL FRONT WIPER ARM AND BLADE ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Operate the wiper and stop the windshield wiper motor at the automatic stop position.
Clean the wiper arm serrations.
When reinstalling:

s3.ptxt: Clean the wiper pivot serrations with a wire brush.

s2.ptxt: Install the front wiper arm and blade assembly LH with the nut to the position shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Hold the arm hinge by hand to fasten the nut.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT WIPER ARM AND BLADE ASSEMBLY RH

s2.ptxt: Operate the wiper and stop the windshield wiper motor at the automatic stop position.
Clean the wiper arm serrations.
When reinstalling:

s3.ptxt: Clean the wiper pivot serrations with a wire brush.

s2.ptxt: Install the front wiper arm and blade assembly RH with the nut to the position shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Hold the arm hinge by hand to fasten the nut.

s2.ptxt: Operate the front wipers while spraying washer fluid on the windshield glass. Make sure that the front wipers function properly and the wipers do not come into contact with the vehicle body.
